Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1BA8 "HERBY-4000-1BA8" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $4000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Herby.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $4000 to setup the correct VICII display settings. This allows the game to be dumped at $1BA8, thus skipping the slow setup initialisation of the original which normally starts at $1B85.
